Standard.Description: A mix of everything that the randomizer has to offer! Attacks are balanced to be closer to their normal power level.

Shuffle.Description: All attack's hitbox properties are shuffled with one another! For example, Falcon's Knee could be Ness's Jab!

Shuffle Balanced.Description: All attacks are shuffled, but only with moves close to their original power level! No Jabs will be shuffled with Rest for example.

Random.Description: Hitboxes and character attributes will be set to random values! Not to be taken too seriously.

Random Balance.Description: All attacks have random properties, but they are closer to their original strength! Attributes are randomized as well.

Chaos.Description: The randomizer is out of control! Expect nothing but CHAOS!!

Competitive.Description: Attacks will launch at their normal angle. Some attacks won't even be changed at all! Characters should play very similar to normal.

Faster Melee.Description: All the characters are a lot faster! Attacks have been randomized as well, with balancing!
